description_long: This is a modern luxury motor yacht with a sleek, streamlined profile and a predominantly white hull accented by dark-tinted windows and brown deck surfaces. The hull features a deep-V shape with multiple large rectangular windows along the sides, and the stern includes a stepped swim platform with railings. The deck is multi-leveled, with a spacious open aft area, a raised cockpit, and a partially enclosed cabin with panoramic windows. The bow is elongated and tapers to a point, providing ample deck space for sunbathing or seating. The superstructure is smooth and aerodynamic, with visible access points and a central helm station. The overall design emphasizes both performance and comfort, suitable for leisure cruising in urban marinas or waterfronts.
description: A sleek, white luxury motor yacht with a deep-V hull, brown deck, and large side windows, featuring a multi-level deck and spacious cabin.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the brown deck layout, open aft area, and the arrangement of the cockpit and cabin.
description_view_1: Starboard side view highlighting the deep-V hull, large side windows, and the stepped swim platform at the stern.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the pointed bow, wide deck, and the forward-facing windows of the cabin.
description_view_3: Port side view similar to the starboard, showing hull windows, the superstructure, and the aft deck features.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a monohull with a pronounced deep-V shape, featuring a white exterior with black rectangular windows along the sides and a stepped stern platform. The hull has smooth, continuous lines and no visible keels or chines.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is multi-leveled with a large open aft area, a raised cockpit, and a partially enclosed upper cabin. There are walkways along the sides, railings at the stern, and a spacious foredeck. The cockpit is centrally located with access to the main cabin.
attribute_cabin_structure: The cabin structure is streamlined and integrated into the superstructure, with large, dark-tinted windows wrapping around the sides and front. There is a single main cabin visible, with no external doors or hatches apparent, and the roof is gently curved.
